Speaker 1: Alright this next tool is a newer one that I've created and it's been so impactful on my
life personally. And every master mind I've shared it with, people are just like, "Wow!"
The tool is called, "I know I'm being successful when." It's to narrow your focus for faster
growth. As we grow, as we start in any business, in anything you do, we have so many
distractions. And the only way to our next level is to stay focused. And this is another
tool to really bring to the surface the things that you should be spending your time,
effort, and energy on.
I say you, yes you in your business, but also the people that will attend your virtual or
your in person master mind. The other thing I wanted to share, and this is just a
reminder, you see as I share this you have access to the tool, you see the tool, it'll be up
back and forth on the screen, you'll see my examples. And you, when you do a virtual
one, you could show it virtual. If you're doing an in person master mind, you can have
the sheets and you hand them out. You can print them, we've created them for you. You
could hand out one that's blank and one that's yours as an example. You can also take it
and turn it into a keynote or a PowerPoint. You can do that with every one of these
tools depending on your level of sophistication.
Now the first one you might just show it or hand it out. The second one, maybe you do a
great keynote. The third one could be interactive. So all depending on where you are, no
worries either way because the value is there, they'll remember a lot more the impact,
not the perfect PowerPoint or the perfect presentation. They'll remember how it hit
their lives. So with "I know I'm being successful when..." this came from a buddy of mine
called Dean Jackson. And Dean Jackson literally used to carry around a little sheet that
said, "I know I'm being successful when..." and he listed all the things.
Now here's why we do that. You know this and so the people that'll be in your master
mind, we know that sometimes we're a different person at work. We're a different
person if we're the boss, if we're an employee, we're different if we're around our
spouses. We're different around our parents. We're different if you're at the night club.
Maybe you're different if you're at church. I say that because there's so many different
variables, sometimes we forget what success means to us. We're just racing after
money, we're racing after significance, we're racing to prove the people who said we
were never gonna make it, prove them wrong, and we forget. So it's a really great convo
to narrow your focus and then really remind yourself, "I'm being successful when I'm
doing what?" And then, well, let me just go through this tool and I think you'll get
massive impact out of it, and you're gonna be so excited to share this with those you're
helping go to another level.
So first. You're gonna narrow your focus for faster growth. In this first section, I would
like you to list five to 10 things that if you use this, the name that Dean Jackson gave it,
"I know I'm being successful when..." What are you doing? What are the things you're
doing when you know you're being successful? Let me give an example before you start.
Dean Jackson's list was pretty awesome. His was, there's no alarm clock ever set in his
house. That he gets up when he wants, anytime he wants, any day. He's a lifestyle
entrepreneur. He wanted to be able to golf at least six rounds every single week. And he
does, golfs about six rounds every single week. He's very similar to how I am, he dresses
